home.title: Trăiește Magia Cappadociei
home.subtitle: Găsește și rezervă aventura perfectă în câteva minute.
home.welcomeTagline: Agenția ta de încredere din Cappadocia
home.welcomeHeading: Bine ați venit la Kısmet Göreme
home.welcomeBody1: Situată în inima Göreme, Kısmet Göreme Travel este specializată în experiențe personalizate în toată Turcia. De la coșurile de fée și hotelurile în peșteră din Cappadocia până la străzile vibrante ale Istanbulului și coasta turcoaz, creăm călătorii de neuitat.
home.welcomeBody2: Fie că este vorba de zboruri cu balonul deasupra Cappadociei, plimbări ghidate prin văi sau experiențe unice în toată Turcia, oferim ospitalitate autentică și amintiri de o viață.
home.ctaTitle: Ai nevoie de ajutor? Suntem aici pentru tine.
home.howItWorks1Desc: Find your best tour and make your free reservation.
home.howItWorks2Desc: When we come to pick you up you can pay in cash.
home.howItWorks3Desc: We will pick you up from your hotel to the tour that you booked.
home.howItWorks4Desc: After the tour we will drop you off at your hotel.
home.whyChoose1Desc: Memorable moments crafted with care so your Cappadocia story stays with you forever.
home.whyChoose2Desc: Comfortable transfers and premium balloon partners for a smooth, elevated experience.
home.whyChoose3Desc: Clear coverage options so you can enjoy your activities with extra peace of mind.
home.whyChoose4Desc: Years of local know-how and curated routes that show the region at its best.
home.whyChoose5Desc: Trained teams, maintained vehicles, and safety-first operations on every trip.
home.whyChoose6Desc: Hand-picked services and attention to detail from booking to drop-off.
home.whyChoose7Desc: Fully licensed travel services you can trust.
home.whyChoose8Desc: Fair policies and support if plans change — we stand behind what we sell.
home.ctaLine1: Plan your Cappadocia journey with reliable local experts.
home.ctaLine2: Contact us via WhatsApp — we value your time, your plans, and every detail you ask about.

footer.aboutDesc: Kısmet Göreme Travel — tururi premium și zboruri cu balonul cu aer cald în Cappadocia.

about.title: Despre Noi
about.tagline: Agenția ta de încredere din Cappadocia
about.body1: Kismet Göreme Travel is a locally rooted travel agency built on years of hospitality experience in Cappadocia.
about.body2: Our journey began with Kismet Cave House (2006) and continues with Kismet Cave Mansion (2025) — two boutique cave hotels that reflect our deep connection to the region and our long-standing experience in hosting guests from all around the world.
about.body3: Lucrăm cu ghizi locali, oferind transport sigur și prețuri transparente pentru o experiență fără griji.
about.body4: We both operate our own experiences and work closely with reliable local partners, allowing us to provide consistent quality, fair pricing, and reliable service.
about.differenceTitle: What makes us different is how we communicate and care:
about.diff1: Fast and direct support via WhatsApp
about.diff2: Honest recommendations based on real local knowledge
about.diff3: Flexible options tailored to your travel plans
about.diff4: A team that truly values your time and questions
about.diff5: A local team you can meet face-to-face during your stay, right here in Cappadocia
about.closingText: Whether you book a single activity or plan your entire stay, our goal is simple — to make your Cappadocia experience smooth, reliable, and unforgettable.
